effects.effect: Each demon acting this turn has a double edge on abilities.
A demon minion of your choice transforms into a non-minion horde demon of the same level.

effects.tier1: The rift remains open and regains 5 Stamina.
effects.effect: Two size 2 rifts to the Abyssal Wasteland appear at locations of your choice. Any demon can use an abyssal rift as a portal to another abyssal rift in the encounter, moving into any space in one rift and appearing immediately in any unoccupied space in the other rift. A non-demon who enters a rift for the first time in a round or starts their turn there takes corruption damage equal to the level of the highest-level demon on the encounter map. An abyssal rift is an immovable object that has 25 Stamina, damage immunity 2, and holy weakness 5. The rift closes when there are no demons remaining on the encounter map. Additionally, a creature who has the Magic or Psionics skill can make a Reason test or Intuition test as a maneuver while adjacent to a rift to destabilize and close it.
The demon activates a Malice feature available to demons of level 9 or lower.

effects.tier1: 10 corruption damage; the target is soul flensed
effects.effect: One demon acting this turn unleashes their pent-up agony and pain on every non-demon in a 5 burst. Each target makes a **Presence test**.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The demon removes all conditions and effects on themself that can be ended by a saving throw, and transfers all those effects to each creature soul flensed this way.
The demon activates a Malice feature available to demons of level or lower.

One demon acting this turn folds space around them, temporarily slipping in and out of the Abyssal Wasteland. Until the start of the demon's next turn, they ignore difficult terrain, can move through solid matter, and don't provoke opportunity attacks by moving. If the demon ends their turn inside solid matter, they are shunted out into the space from which they entered it.
The demon activates a Malice feature available to demons of level 6 or lower.

One demon acting this turn expels blight—digested soul juice—onto the ground around them in a 3 burst that lingers until the start of their next turn. Any enemy who enters the area or starts their turn there takes 6 corruption damage, and has a double bane on power rolls until the start of their next turn.
Whenever any demon is reduced to 0 Stamina within 10 squares of Aurumvas, the Director gains 1 Malice. Aurumvas loses this trait while he is dazed.
Aurumvas regains Stamina equal to the damage dealt.
While dazed this way, a target can't gain Heroic Resources.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Aurumvas chooses a supernatural treasure or an item made of gold and teleports to an unoccupied space adjacent to that object, then ends one effect on him that can be ended by a saving throw.
While Aurumvas is winded, he has a double edge on strikes.
Any creature within 5 squares of Aurumvas can't be hidden from him.

features.name: Time Is Money
features.target: Self and each ally in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Aurumvas warps time with his abyssal avarice. Each target can teleport up to their speed and make a free strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Aurumvas chooses up to three treasures within distance that he has line of effect to and that aren't artifacts. Until the end of the encounter, ethereal golden snakes swirl around the target treasures. While an affected treasure is worn or held by a hero, each time that hero gains any amount of their Heroic Resource, the Director gains 1 Malice.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Aurumvas summons treasures from his vaults into the area, then causes them to explode.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target has corruption weakness 5 (EoT).
If the target has I < 2, they have corruption weakness 5 (save ends).

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: The bale eye must create the cube beneath themself.

effects.tier1: 3 psychic damage; A < 1 the target is warped (save ends)
effects.tier2: 5 psychic damage; A < 2 the target is warped (save ends)
effects.tier3: 6 psychic damage; A < 3 the target is warped (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: While warped, a creature has a double bane on power rolls using any characteristic higher than 0, and has a double edge on power rolls using any characteristic lower than 0.
While the bale eye is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 5 squares of the bale eye can't be hidden from them.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target makes a strike while weakened this way, the bendrak can choose a second target within distance for the strike. The first target takes half of any damage from the strike and the second target takes any remaining damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target is invisible until the start of their next turn. They can then move up to 3 squares and attempt to hide.
While the bendrak is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the bendrak can't be hidden from them.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A puddle of blight—digested soul juice—covers the ground in the target's square, which is affected as if by Seeping Blight (see the Level 7+ Demon Malice feature).

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: The blight phage must create the cube beneath themself.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The blight phage spins and sheds corruptive blight to fill the area, which is treated as if affected by Seeping Blight.
The blight phage chooses three 2 cube areas within 10 squares of the phage. Each area is covered with blight and treated as if affected by Seeping Blight.
While the blight phage is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the blight phage can't be hidden from them.

effects.tier3: 13 cold, fire, or sonic damage; M < 4 bleeding, dazed, or slowed (save ends)

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: After making the power roll, the chimeron decides what damage type the ability deals and which condition it imposes.

features.name: Pain Absorption
features.trigger: The chimeron is targeted by a damage-dealing strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The chimeron halves the damage.
While the chimeron is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the chimeron can't be hidden from them.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: One ally within 10 squares of the chorogaunt shifts up to their speed.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The chorogaunt slides each target up to 3 squares, ignoring stability.

features.name: I Thrive on Pain
features.trigger: The chorogaunt is targeted by a strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Any damage from the strike is halved, and the chorogaunt's abilities deal an extra 3 damage until the end of their next turn.
At the end of each of their turns, the chorogaunt can take 5 damage to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.
While the chorogaunt is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the chorogaunt can't be hidden from them.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target must choose between taking 5 psychic damage, or being frightened (save ends).

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The chorogaunt kills the target, and each other ally in the encounter deals an extra 3 damage with strikes until the end of the round. The Director gains Malice equal to the number of heroes in the encounter.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The chorogaunt shifts up to their speed, uses Agonizing Harmony, shifts up to their speed, and then uses Agonizing Harmony again.

features.name: Barbed Tongues
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target is pulled adjacent to the ensnarer, the ensnarer can make a free strike against them.
Any creature within 2 squares of the ensnarer can't be hidden from them.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each enemy adjacent to the fangling takes 2 damage.
Whenever an adjacent enemy grabs the fangling or uses a melee ability against the fangling, they take 2 damage.
While the fangling is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the fangling can't be hidden from them.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The fiktin violently changes shape, dealing an extra 6 damage to any target they were hidden from with their Aggressive Mimicry ability.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The fiktin transforms into a mundane object of their size or smaller and is automatically hidden. They can revert to their true form as a free maneuver.
While the fiktin is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the fiktin can't be hidden from them.

features.name: Rip and Tear
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.effect: Any creature within 2 squares of the frenzied can't be hidden from them.

features.name: Spinning Bone Blade
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The grulqin gains an edge on this ability if they previously moved 3 or more squares in a straight line on their turn.
Any creature within 2 squares of the grulqin can't be hidden from them.

features.name: Bilious Expulsion
features.target: One creature or object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The ground and any surfaces in the area pool with slime. The slime is difficult terrain for enemies, and any enemy is bleeding while in the area.

features.name: Spew Slide
features.trigger: The gunge takes damage from a melee strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The gunge vomits with great force, letting them shift up to their speed and ignore any additional effects from the strike. The space the gunge occupied before the shift is covered in slime that is difficult terrain for enemies. Additionally, any enemy is bleeding while in the slime.
While the gunge is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the gunge can't be hidden from them.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The izyak can slide any target restrained this way up to 3 squares.
The izyak can vertical slide any target restrained this way up to 6 squares instead. A target left in midair doesn't fall until the restrained condition ends.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Any target dazed this way must use a move action to move their speed toward the izyak on their next turn.
The area increases to a 6 cube.
While the izyak is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the izyak can't be hidden from them.
Two ensnarers appear in unoccupied spaces adjacent to each target. On a tier 3 outcome, four ensnarers appear.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Four level 1 demon minions (most commonly ensnarers, frenzieds, and pitlings) burst forth from the egress and appear in unoccupied spaces in the area.
Four level 4 demon minions (most commonly orliq, grulqins, and wobalas) appear instead.

features.name: Abyssal Protectors
features.trigger: The last ally minion on the encounter map dies, or the egress is reduced below 25 Stamina.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Eight ensnarers appear anywhere in the area.
At the end of each of their turns, the egress can take 10 damage to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.

effects.tier3: 15 corruption damage; two frenzieds appear in unoccupied spaces adjacent to each target

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The egress folds into their own portal and teleports to an unoccupied space within distance. Four level 4 demon minions (most commonly orliq, grulqins, and wobalas) appear in squares in the egress's former space.

features.name: Blood of the Abyss
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The egress recalls and instantly destroys any minion allies on the encounter map. A torrent of churned-up minion bodies, blood, and ichor erupts from the egress, dealing an extra 1 damage for each minion destroyed this way.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target is pulled adjacent to the muceron, the muceron can either make a free strike or use the Grab maneuver against them.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The muceron pulls each target up to 5 squares.
While the muceron is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the muceron can't be hidden from them.

features.name: Optical Flare
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.tier3: 10 fire damage; this damage ignores immunity

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: This ability ignores concealment. A winded target takes an extra 5 damage.

features.name: Soul Prism
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.effect: Any enemy who starts their turn with two or more orliq adjacent to them is slowed (EoT).
Any creature within 2 squares of the orliq can't be hidden from them.
Any enemy who has three or more pitlings within 2 squares of them can't regain Stamina.
Any creature within 2 squares of the pitling can't be hidden from them.

effects.tier1: 5 damage; the remasch can teleport up to 2 squares
effects.tier2: 6 damage; the remasch can teleport up to 3 squares
effects.tier3: 8 damage; the remasch can teleport up to 5 squares

effects.effect: The remasch takes an adjacent creature with them when they teleport. The creature appears in an unoccupied space adjacent to the remasch's destination.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The remasch can teleport up to 2 squares and uses Abyssal Strike.
While the remasch is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the remasch can't be hidden from them.

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: Each target must be at less than full Stamina.
While the ruinant is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the ruinant can't be hidden from them.

A host creature implanted by a soulraker hivequeen's Stinging Ovipositor has no physical or mental signs of the handmaiden gestating inside the host's body.

After 1d3 + 1 weeks of gestation, the handmaiden fully forms inside the host. The handmaiden always moves with and occupies the same space as the host and can't be separated from them. While totally within the creature, the handmaiden doesn't have line of effect to the host or targets outside the host and vice versa. As a maneuver, the handmaiden can emerge from the host as a horrifying tower of flesh and bone that remains attached to the host's insides. While emerged, the handmaiden can use a move action to make the host move up to their speed and has access to the host's signature abilities, using the host's modifiers for any power rolls. The handmaiden has the same Stability as the host. If the handmaiden or host is force moved, the other moves with them. While emerged, the handmaiden can be targeted independently of the host. The handmaiden can retreat totally within the host's body as a maneuver. If the handmaiden dies, their remains separate from the host.
The Find a Cure downtime project in Draw Steel: Heroes can be used to find a cure that removes a handmaiden from a host. The cure kills the handmaiden when consumed.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the handmaiden was totally within their host's body at the start of this turn, the ability deals an extra 8 damage.
While the handmaiden is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.

effects.tier3: 23 poison damage; M < 5 the target is implanted

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: An implanted target has a soulraker handmaiden parasite gestating in them (see the handmaiden's Implanted Parasite trait).

features.name: Forced Gestation
features.target: Each implanted handmaiden parasite in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The hivequeen lets loose a subsonic call to each target, forcing them to immediately emerge from their host's body as a mature soulraker handmaiden and make a free strike.

features.name: For the Queen!
features.trigger: The hivequeen is targeted by a strike for the second time on an attacker's turn, whether by the attacker or another creature acting on the attacker's turn.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Two soulraker minions appear within distance.
A soulraker praetorian also appears within distance.
At the end of their turn, the hivequeen can consume an adjacent soulraker demon to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw (no action required).
Any creature within 2 squares of a soulraker demon within 100 miles of the hivequeen can't be hidden from the hivequeen. The hivequeen has line of effect to such creatures.

features.name: Kicking the Nest
features.target: Each soulraker minion in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target can move their speed and make a free strike. If no minions are present, four soulraker minions are summoned into unoccupied spaces within distance before the hivequeen uses this villain action.

effects.tier3: 11 sonic damage; push 3; I < 5 dazed (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The hivequeen shifts up to her speed.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The praetorian can shift into each square the target leaves.

features.name: Stinging Departure
features.trigger: A creature ends the praetorian's grab.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The praetorian makes a free strike against the target, breaks off part of their stinger in the target, and shifts up to half their speed. The target is bleeding until they remove the stinger fragment as a free maneuver, taking 6 damage in the process.
While the praetorian is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature who starts their turn with two or more praetorians adjacent to them takes 6 sonic damage.

effects.tier2: 6 poison damage; the scout can shift 1 square
effects.tier3: 7 poison damage; the scout shifts up to 3 squares

effects.effect: Any enemy who starts their turn with two or more soulraker minions adjacent to them takes 3 sonic damage.

features.name: Chitin Bash
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.effect: Any enemy who starts their turn with two or more soulraker minions adjacent to them takes 3 sonic damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: All soulraker demons have concealment from the target until the start of the stinger's next turn.
Any enemy who starts their turn with two or more soulraker minions adjacent to them takes 3 sonic damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Any target restrained by the styrich's Tangled Nest ability can be pulled the distance determined by the power roll.

effects.tier2: Slowed (EoT) or A < 3 3 damage and restrained (EoT)
effects.tier3: Restrained (EoT) or A < 4 3 damage and restrained (save ends)

effects.effect: While the styrich is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the styrich can't be hidden from them.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The ground in the area turns into a morass of spongy flesh before the targets are force moved. Until the start of the torlas's next turn, the area is difficult terrain, and each creature who moves in the area takes 1 damage for each square moved.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The torlas pulls each target up to 3 squares.
While the torlas is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the torlas can't be hidden from them.

effects.tier3: 11 damage; grabbed, and the target takes a bane on the Escape Grab maneuver

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Any target grabbed this way takes 4 psychic damage at the start of each of the tormenauk's turns.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The potency increases by 1 if the target is grabbed by the tormenauk.
While the tormenauk is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the tormenauk can't be hidden from them.

features.name: Tail Bite
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The tyburaki can make a free strike against each enemy adjacent to the target.
While swimming, the tyburaki can jump 5 squares as part of their movement.
Any creature within 2 squares of the tyburaki can't be hidden from them.

monsters.name: Unguloid
monsters.with_captain: Have a double edge on strikes

features.name: Gore Horn
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If this ability is used as part of a charge for which the unguloid moves 2 squares or more, it deals an extra 10 damage.
Any creature within 2 squares of the unguloid can't be hidden from them.

effects.tier3: 14 damage; I < 5 the target is slowed and weakened (save ends)

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: The effects of being slowed and weakened this way can't be ignored.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Any creature who is bleeding from this ability loses 2d6 Stamina instead of 1d6.
While the vicisitator is winded, they gain an edge on strikes, and any strike made against them gains an edge.
Any creature within 2 squares of the vicisitator can't be hidden from them.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target takes a bane on their next strike. If the target is winded, they have a double bane on their next strike instead.
